context.description: The system supports tagging articles and allows users to click on a tag to view related articles. However, the current behavior is inconsistent.

problem.summary: Clicking on certain tags does not return expected articles, even though those articles are correctly associated with the tag.

details.issue: Some tags work correctly and return articles.
Some tags (e.g. "#empty-state") return no results, even though there are articles linked to that tag.
This indicates inconsistency between tag data and search/filter logic.

problem.expected_behavior: Clicking on any tag should return all articles associated with that tag.
problem.actual_behavior: Certain tags return empty results incorrectly.

possible_causes.cause: Search query incorrectly filtering by tag name instead of tagId
Missing JOIN between Article, ArticleTag, and Tag tables
Frontend sending incorrect query parameter (slug vs name mismatch)

requirements.requirement: Check that ArticleTag records exist for the affected tag
Ensure tag names are stored consistently (no leading '#')
Ensure filtering is done by tagId instead of tag name when possible
Ensure correct JOIN between Article, ArticleTag, and Tag
Ensure correct tag identifier is sent in API request
Test tags with special characters (e.g. hyphen, #)

acceptance_criteria.criteria: All tags return correct associated articles
Tags with special characters work correctly
